title: You can't damage me!
description: Simple mod adding few gamerules controlling taking damage by player
body:
You can't damage me! is a simple mod adding few gamerules controlling taking damage by player.

This mod requires Fabric API

 

List of gamerules:
- playerDamage - Controls if player takes any damage (preserves knockback)
- playerDamageScale - Scales damage given to the player (in percentages, 100 is default, setting it to 200 will make damage x2 bigger)
- entityAttackDamage - Allows entities to damage player
- magicDamage - Deal magic (potion) damage
- selfDamage - Player can attack themself (with bow, etc)

Presentation of playerDamage gamerule:
https://youtu.be/wRWqulKuqZc
